title: Pilot Location Data Binding and Timezone Basis Record
corrections: Four pilot location controls now carry latitude, longitude, timezone, location_id, country, type, source status and review status.
Selected place basis is summarized for Star Reflection and Panchang.
Coordinate-entry basis is summarized for Star Reflection and Panchang.
Optional place label is treated as display/reference label only, not as computation basis.

basis_rules.approved_place_basis: Selected pilot place resolves to location_id, display label, latitude, longitude and timezone.
basis_rules.coordinate_basis: User-entered latitude, longitude and timezone form the computation basis; optional place label is display-only.
basis_rules.timezone_rule: Selected pilot places resolve timezone automatically. Coordinate mode keeps typed timezone pending later IANA validation.
basis_rules.future_search_rule: Searchable picker will return approved database records with coordinates, timezone, source freshness and review status.
